signals.headline: XRP spot ETFs recorded $41
signals.raw: XRP spot ETFs recorded $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16**—the largest single-week inflow in three months and a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million.[1] This acceleration in institutional demand represents a significant development, as the inflow pattern is arriving before a price breakout rather than following one, suggesting strong conviction among ETF particip
